path.description: URL path the host registers for this workflow (e.g., `/hooks/github/push`). Host's webhook subsystem maps the path → workflow registration. Pattern restricts to safe-for-URL characters.

methods.description: HTTP methods this webhook accepts. Defaults to POST. Hosts MAY return 405 on unmatched methods.

secret.description: Optional HMAC secret reference (a credentialRef per the host's secret-resolution mechanism, NOT a literal). If set, hosts verify incoming requests carry a valid HMAC signature per spec/v1/webhooks.md §verification. Missing signature → host returns 401 BEFORE invoking the workflow.
